title: Line 45600 – Part XII.2 tax credit - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 45600 – Part XII.2 tax credit
The Part XII.2 tax credit will be shown in box 38 on all of your T3 slips and in box 209 on all of your T5013 slips .

## Completing your tax return
Enter on line 45600 of your return the total of amounts shown in box 38 of all your T3 slips and box 209 of your T5013 slips .

## Forms and publications
- Guide T4013, T3 Trust Guide
- T3 slip, Statement of Trust Income Allocations and Designations
- T5013 slip, Statement of Partnership Income

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
